body.generated_test_code:
from __future__ import annotations

from sentinel_alpha.infra.generated_terminals.smoke_broker import SmokeBrokerTerminalAdapter


def test_terminal_smoke_broker_adapter_routes_order_and_position_calls() -> None:
    adapter = SmokeBrokerTerminalAdapter(base_url="https://api.example.com")
    calls = []

    def fake_request(method: str, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None, payload: dict | None = None) -> dict:
        calls.append((method, path, params or {}, payload or {}))
        return {"ok": True, "method": method, "path": path, "payload": payload or {}}

    adapter._request_json = fake_request  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    adapter.place_order("AAPL", "buy", 100, order_type="limit", limit_price=195.5)
    adapter.fetch_order_status("ORD-1")
    adapter.cancel_order("ORD-1")
    adapter.fetch_positions()
    adapter.fetch_balances()

    assert len(calls) == 5
    assert calls[0][0] == "POST"
    assert calls[0][3]["symbol"] == "AAPL"
    assert calls[1][2]["order_id"] == "ORD-1"
    assert calls[2][3]["order_id"] == "ORD-1"
    assert calls[3][0] == "GET"
    assert calls[4][0] == "GET"

actions: Verify the official docs URL or provide a reachable documentation page before deeper integration tests.

def test_terminal_smoke_broker_adapter_routes_order_and_position_calls() -> None:

    def fake_request(method: str, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None, payload: dict | None = None) -> dict:
        calls.append((method, path, params or {}, payload or {}))
        return {"ok": True, "method": method, "path": path, "payload": payload or {}}

    adapter._request_json = fake_request  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    adapter.place_order("AAPL", "buy", 100, order_type="limit", limit_price=195.5)

    assert calls[0][0] == "POST"
    assert calls[0][3]["symbol"] == "AAPL"
    assert calls[1][2]["order_id"] == "ORD-1"
